violations.text: Calzones delivered at approximately 8 a.m. observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Calzones were placed in freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026

Calzones, muffins, and bread prepared at Zaccagnini on Smithfield Ave in Pawtucket, packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Labeling information given to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2026

The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the small ice cream chest freezer have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2024

Milk in the small coffee area refrigerator was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was placed in freezer to rapidly chill, and will not be returned to small refrigerator until refrigerator reaches 41 degrees F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

Bakery products and calzones purchased wholesale from Zaccagnini's have incomplete labels, in addition to labels with an address of a closed location. Food must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerators have an accumulation of debris. Non-food contact surfaces of freezers have an accumulation of frost. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the 3 bay sink/hand sink area, and toilet room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
